message.content:
@startuml
title CONTROLLERS's Class Diagram

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "app" {
  package "controllers" {

    interface "javafx\nfxml\nInitializable" as Initializable

    class ClassController {
      - obj : ObservableList<Class>
      - classes : TableColumn<Class, Button>
      - col_id : TableColumn<Class, String>
      - col_name : TableColumn<Class, String>
      - col_time : TableColumn<Class, String>
      - col_semester : TableColumn<Class, String>
      - col_updated : TableColumn<Class, String>
      - tableview : TableView<Class>
      - txt_id : TextField
      - txt_name : TextField
      - txt_time : TextField
      + addClass()
      + initialize()
      + home()
    }

    class DashboardController {
      - obj : ObservableList<Attendance>
      - classes : ChoiceBox<String>
      - col_att : TableColumn<Student, String>
      - col_attIn : TableColumn<Student, Button>
      - col_attIn : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
      - col_attOut : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
      - col_id : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
      - col_name : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
      - col_updated : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
      - course : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
      - course : TableColumn<Student, String>
